ASR_explanation: The real-time data updates, threshold alerting, and audit logging significantly impact system performance and architectural design choices for scalability and reliability.

acceptance_criteria:

The notification should be delivered promptly and include clear information about the low water levels. The notification should be easily noticeable to ensure the user is comletely aware of the low water levels.
ASR_explanation: Continuous real-time monitoring and prompt alerting will require careful consideration of system performance, communication protocols, and asynchronous messaging.

The notification should prominently feature an exclamation mark highlighted in red ensuring it effectively grabs the user's attention for quick decision-making.
ASR_explanation: This user story impacts the system's event-driven notification mechanisms and real-time processing, requiring architectural decisions about sensor integration and alert delivery channels.

acceptance_criteria: Implement a promotional system that offers discounts coupon codes and limited-time offers. Promotions should be visible on the homepage product pages and the checkout page. Users should be able to apply discounts during the checkout process. Promotions should be tracked and evaluated for effectiveness in increasing sales and customer retention.
ASR_explanation: Integrating promotional campaign functionalities affects UI display across several pages, checkout processing, and analytics, thus impacting overall system architecture and integrations.

user_story: As a user I want the platform to provide live chat support with a virtual assistant available to assist new users and address potential issues.
acceptance_criteria: A live chat feature should be accessible from the platform's interface typically available in a visible location such as a chat icon or button. Users should have the option to initiate a live chat session with a virtual assistant for immediate assistance. The virtual assistant should be capable of providing assistance with common user inquiries such as account setup product search order tracking and general information about the platform.
ASR_explanation: This user story introduces real-time communication and integration challenges that affect service scalability, performance, and overall system design.

user_story: As a platform administrator I want to implement a feedback system to gather user input and improve the system's functionality and user experience.
acceptance_criteria: The platform should provide a feedback section or form that is accessible to all users. Users should be able to provide feedback on various aspects of the platform including usability customer support and product quality. The feedback system should record and categorize user input for analysis and reporting.
ASR_explanation: Introducing a feedback system affects multiple layers—UI, data processing, and reporting—necessitating scalable data storage, integration points, and cross-cutting security and analytics considerations.

user_story: As a user I want the platform to set limitations on order cancellations to ensure a fair shopping experience such as restricting users from canceling the same product more than twice
acceptance_criteria: A cancellation policy should be documented and made available to all users for reference. Users should not be allowed to cancel the same product more than twice within a specified time frame (e.g. 7 days. The cancellation policy should clearly outline valid reasons for cancellations such as damaged items late deliveries or incorrect product descriptions.
ASR_explanation: The story involves enforcing business rules in order management, with minimal impact on the overall system architecture.

user_story: As a user I want to be able to rate and review sellers based on my experience and I want to see how ratings and reviews are displayed.
acceptance_criteria: Users should have the option to rate and review sellers after completing a purchase. Seller ratings and reviews should be visible on the seller's profile page. Users can sort seller ratings by date rating or helpfulness. Users should be able to report inappropriate or fraudulent reviews.
ASR_explanation: This story adds a functional feature without demanding major changes to the system’s underlying architecture.

user_story: As a shopper I want the ability to initiate returns and refunds for canceled orders or unsatisfactory products and understand the terms and conditions of the return and refund policy
acceptance_criteria: The platform should have a visible and accessible return and refund policy. Users should be able to initiate a return request for specific orders or products. Clear instructions for the return process including how to package and ship items should be provided.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts critical subsystems (order management, customer service, and policy management) and requires robust integration and workflow mechanisms for returns and refunds.

user_story: As a shopper I want to search for products on the platform using a search bar and apply advanced filters and sorting options to quickly find the items I'm looking for.
acceptance_criteria: The platform must have a prominently displayed search bar. Users can enter keywords in the search bar to find products. Advanced search options such as filters by category price range and sorting by relevance price or rating should be available. Search results should update dynamically as users type or apply filters.
ASR_explanation: The implementation affects core search architecture, including real-time query processing, indexing, and performance optimizations for dynamic filtering and sorting.

user_story: As a shopper I want the platform to offer special promotions and discounts during specific seasons or events to encourage engagement and savings.
acceptance_criteria: The platform should have a dedicated section for displaying ongoing promotions and discounts. Users should receive notifications or alerts about the start and end of discount seasons. Users should be able to see the types and percentages of discounts offered. The timing and duration of discount seasons should be clearly specified
ASR_explanation: The introduction of a dedicated promotions section, notifications, and timing mechanisms impacts multiple layers, requiring careful architectural design and integration of new components.

user_story: As a customer I want the ability to search for the desired product by just clicking on the voice search icon so that I can find the products of my choice.
acceptance_criteria: The virtual try-on feature should be available for clothing and accessories. When I click on the voice search icon the microphone should open and start recording my voice. After stating my desired product into the microphone the platform should search and display the relevant products on my screen. The voice search feature should be accurate user-friendly and free from disruptions.
ASR_explanation: Integrating a voice search feature impacts multiple layers—including the UI, service integration with speech recognition providers, and error handling mechanisms—making it architecturally significant.

user_story: As a customer I want a fast and straightforward checkout process so that I can complete my purchase with ease and save time
acceptance_criteria: I should be able to add items to my shopping cart directly from the product page. My shopping cart should provide a summary of selected items showing product details quantities and the total cost. When I decide to proceed to checkout the process should be limited to a maximum of three steps inputting shipping information providing payment details and receiving order confirmation. During the payment phase I should be able to securely input my payment information and if applicable apply discounts or redeem gift cards. Upon order confirmation I should be presented with a summary of my order detailing the items the total cost and the projected delivery date.
ASR_explanation: The story impacts key system components such as transactional security, multi-step workflow orchestration, and integration with payment processing services, which are critical architectural concerns.

user_story: As a customer I want to utilize a Virtual Try-On feature to envision how clothing and accessories will appear on me before I finalize my purchase.
acceptance_criteria: The product pages for applicable items namely clothing and accessories should prominently feature a "Virtual Try-On" option. Upon selecting "Virtual Try-On" my device's camera should be triggered offering me a real-time view of myself. While viewing myself I should be given the option to overlay different products onto my image and observe how they look on me in real-time. This feature should also grant me the ability to adjust the placement and sizing of the virtual product ensuring it accurately corresponds to my dimensions. The interface should permit me to take photos or brief video clips of myself while I'm "wearing" the virtual items.
ASR_explanation: This feature introduces significant architectural challenges including real-time augmented reality performance, device integration, and scalable user interface design across multiple platforms.

user_story: As a customer I want to be a part of a Loyalty Gamification program gaining rewards for my engagement to enhance and make my shopping journey both fun and beneficial.
acceptance_criteria: From the website or mobile application of the e-commerce platform I should have the option to enroll in the Loyalty Gamification program. For various activities on the platform like making purchases penning down reviews endorsing products on social media or bringing in friends through referrals I should be rewarded points. A designated "Rewards" section should be clearly available presenting information like my current points balance potential rewards I can claim and methods to accumulate more points. The platform should allow me to exchange my points for perks such as discounts exclusive products or other offerings. Moreover the gamification system should notify me whenever I climb up to a new level or when I earn distinct rewards
ASR_explanation: This user story introduces a rewarding mechanism that spans multiple system components and may require new services, integrations, and modifications to UI and data storage, impacting the overall architecture.

user_story: As a customer I aim to use Augmented Reality (AR to virtually review products allowing me to visualize them in real-world settings prior to purchase.
acceptance_criteria: Each product page should have a designated area or tab labeled "AR Product Reviews" or something similar. Customers who have acquired the item have the ability to submit AR-centric reviews incorporating either images or brief video content that displays the product within their actual surroundings. By tapping on an AR review I can utilize my device's AR capabilities to superimpose and see that review in my present environment. It should be possible for me to manipulate the AR content such as rotating or zooming in on the product to understand its look and potential fit within my space.
ASR_explanation: This story is architecturally significant as it necessitates integrating AR capabilities into the product review system, impacting both the front-end (UI/UX interactions) and back-end (data processing, media storage) architecture as well as device feature utilization.

user_story: As a customer I am seeking curated bundles of products that allow me to both discover and buy related items in a convenient manner and at a reduced rate.
acceptance_criteria: The e-commerce platform should prominently feature a "Curated Bundles" segment either as a menu item homepage section or dedicated page. Within this segment I should encounter diverse bundles grouped by categories like apparel and accessories tech products or gift sets. Every bundle listing should give a clear view of its content enumerating individual product prices alongside the bundled rate emphasizing the potential savings. Clicking on a particular bundle should offer a comprehensive view with descriptions enlarged images and other relevant details of the included products. Upon selecting a bundle for purchase all its components should seamlessly integrate into my shopping cart with their respective quantities clearly indicated. Furthermore the platform ought to permit bundle customization enabling me to select different product variations or substitute certain items while still retaining the bundled discount.
ASR_explanation: It requires modifications to UI, product pricing logic, checkout workflow, and integration of dynamic discount management for bundle customization.

user_story: As a customer my desire is to accumulate points following every purchase I make on the e-commerce platform. This system should later allow me to convert these points into rewards or discounts enhancing my overall shopping experience.
acceptance_criteria: Each completed purchase should grant me points; the amount of which should be proportional to the purchase value or another predefined criteria. At both cart and checkout stages the platform should clearly present the amount of points that the ongoing purchase will generate. To maintain transparency the platform should disclose how it calculates points possibly in a dedicated FAQ or policy section. My user dashboard or account area should offer a consistent display of my current points balance. The conclusion of every purchase should automatically reflect in my points balance. Additionally a notification or confirmation message should inform me about the new points addition. The platform should facilitate the conversion of my accumulated points allowing me to apply them for obtaining discounts or redeeming specific rewards.
ASR_explanation: This story introduces a new cross-cutting loyalty system that integrates with purchases, user dashboards, and notifications, requiring careful coordination of data consistency and service interactions.

user_story: As a customer I aspire to elevate my gifting experience by adding a personal touch to my purchased items through various gift-wrapping options. This way I can convey my feelings more thoughtfully to my friends and family when presenting them with gifts.
acceptance_criteria: During the checkout process an easily noticeable option should let me select gift wrapping either for specific items in my cart or for the entire order. Opting for gift wrapping should present me with diverse choices in terms of wrapping paper designs ribbon colors and customizable gift tags. To assist me in making the perfect choice a preview displaying the potential appearance of the wrapped item should be made available. The platform should permit the addition of a personalized message on the gift tag facilitating a heartfelt note for the recipient. The final order summary should transparently incorporate the additional charges for the selected gift-wrapping options.
ASR_explanation: It affects the core checkout process with UI enhancements, pricing logic, and order processing, necessitating architectural changes.

user_story: As a customer my desire is to accumulate points following every purchase I make on the e-commerce platform. This system should later allow me to convert these points into rewards or discounts enhancing my overall shopping experience.
acceptance_criteria: Each completed purchase should grant me points; the amount of which should be proportional to the purchase value or another predefined criteria. At both cart and checkout stages the platform should clearly present the amount of points that the ongoing purchase will generate. To maintain transparency the platform should disclose how it calculates points possibly in a dedicated FAQ or policy section. My user dashboard or account area should offer a consistent display of my current points balance. The conclusion of every purchase should automatically reflect in my points balance. Additionally a notification or confirmation message should inform me about the new points addition. The platform should facilitate the conversion of my accumulated points allowing me to apply them for obtaining discounts or redeeming specific rewards.
ASR_explanation: This story affects multiple system layers including business logic, data storage, UI integration, and notifications that will require thoughtful coordination and scalability planning.

user_story: As an online shopper I value an immersive and tailored shopping experience. To make informed purchasing decisions and simplify my journey I wish to leverage the capabilities of a Virtual Shopping Assistant. This digital aid would understand my preferences respond to queries and proactively offer relevant recommendations.
acceptance_criteria: An easily identifiable icon or button should be present on the online store allowing me instant access to the Virtual Shopping Assistant. Engaging with this feature should initiate a responsive chat or voice interface ensuring that my queries or needs are promptly addressed. Based on my online behavior such as past purchases viewed items or saved preferences the Virtual Shopping Assistant should be adept at offering tailored product suggestions. It should be capable of addressing a myriad of questions be it related to product details cost breakdowns shipping timelines or anything pertinent to my shopping experience. For an enriched customer experience the assistant should proactively aid in product selection by advising on aspects like size charts color palettes or technical specifications.
ASR_explanation: This story requires integration of real-time personalization and multi-modal interfaces that significantly influence system design and architecture.

user_story: As a discerning shopper I prioritize informed decision-making. For products that are intricate or come with a learning curve visual demonstrations are pivotal. I wish to access product demos on the e-commerce platform to gauge the product's quality material and usability ensuring I make the right purchase choice.
acceptance_criteria: Each product demo should be crafted meticulously ensuring it remains succinct yet informative. The demo should spotlight the product's primary features and showcase its functionality in real-world scenarios. For an uninterrupted viewing experience I should be able to watch these demonstrations in full screen. The interface should also grant me control allowing for actions like pausing rewinding or fast-forwarding to specific sections of the demo.
ASR_explanation: This user story impacts the system's media streaming, UI components, and integration layers, requiring careful architectural considerations for video processing and playback mechanisms.

user_story: As a frequent shopper I'm on the lookout for value and convenience. The prospect of receiving exclusive discounts and promotions via a subscription model is enticing. I aspire for a service that not only brings my desired products to my doorstep consistently but also does so in a cost-effective manner. This ensures I can indulge in my shopping habits without straining my wallet
acceptance_criteria: The moment I show interest in a subscription the platform must entice me with attractive offers. Be it a percentage-based reduction a direct discount on the total amount or a bundle deal the proposition should scream value. The intricacies of the discount including its calculation and application should be communicated transparently ensuring I'm fully aware of the savings I'm making. I value customization. The subscription model should provide options allowing me to tailor it based on my consumption patterns and preferences. An itemized bill should greet me every billing cycle. This bill should depict the product's original cost the discounts applied and any supplementary charges that might arise such as shipping. Proactiveness is key. I expect timely reminders and notifications as my billing date approaches. These alerts should be comprehensive enabling me to review amend or even terminate my subscription as per my current needs.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts core system components like subscription management, dynamic pricing, billing transparency, and notification systems, necessitating consistent, scalable, and integrated architectural design.

user_story: My shopping experience is not a straight path but more like a meandering river. As I navigate through the vast sea of products I need a place to temporarily store items of interest. The "Add to Cart" feature acts as my personal basket collecting my desired products and giving me the freedom to adjust and reconsider before the final purchase.
acceptance_criteria: Browsing is only half the fun; buying is where the real action is. Every product listing should empower me with an "Add to Cart" button letting me swiftly earmark items I'm interested in. A simple click is all I want but sometimes I need more than just one. Thus alongside the "Add to Cart" option I should be able to specify the quantity of the product I'm adding. Out of sight out of mind? Not with my cart. I should be able to view its contents ensuring that I don't forget the treasures I've collected along the way. My decisions aren't always final and I appreciate some flexibility. If I've been too enthusiastic with a product I want to easily increase or decrease its quantity in the cart. Similarly if I have second thoughts about an item removing it should be a breeze.
ASR_explanation: This story describes standard e-commerce functionality with typical state and session management, lacking broad architectural impact.

user_story: As a conscientious shopper I am deeply concerned about the environment. Every purchase I make should not only cater to my needs but should also be in harmony with nature. Receiving my order in an eco-friendly package is more than a preference; it's a statement I want to make. My shopping experience becomes truly fulfilling when I know the packaging aligns with my values ensuring a greener planet for the future.
acceptance_criteria: It's imperative for the e-commerce platform to adopt an eco-centric approach when packaging products. Every touchpoint from the initial packaging to the last layer should be designed to have minimal ecological impact. Transparency is pivotal. A dedicated section on the platform detailing the store's commitment to environmental sustainability should be available for consumers. This section should talk about the choice of materials the design philosophy and the larger vision for eco-friendly packaging. Sustainability doesn't end at philosophy; it's rooted in action. All materials used be it the box envelopes or even the tiny fillers inside should be eco-friendly. This means materials that are easily recyclable degrade without leaving a trace and sourced responsibly. Choice matters. As a consumer I should have the power to opt for minimalistic packaging. The platform should accommodate requests for minimal packaging thus ensuring materials are utilized only when absolutely essential. The printed materials if any should be infused with eco-friendly ink. Moreover these materials should carry clear labels indicating their recyclability ensuring users can dispose of them responsibly.
ASR_explanation: This user story requires integrating eco-friendly packaging requirements and a new transparency feature, affecting both hardware interfaces and software modules for material tracking and user options.

user_story: In a digital age personal touchpoints often get lost in the vastness of online shopping. As a customer it's not just about buying a product. It's about the entire experience. Receiving a personalized thank-you note or message makes me feel valued and acknowledged. Such gestures not only make my shopping experience more enjoyable but also make me want to return to the store. It's these little things that make all the difference.
acceptance_criteria: Once my purchase has been successfully completed I expect to see a thank-you message. Not a generic one but something that feels tailored appearing right on the confirmation page. Personalization is the key. The thank-you message shouldn't just be a template. It should address me by my name making it evident that the store acknowledges and values its customers on a personal level. Beyond just thanks the message should resonate with the brand's voice emphasizing how easy valuable and unique shopping at this e-commerce store is. To make the gesture even more memorable a follow-up thank-you note echoing the same sentiment should arrive in my inbox. It's these small yet significant touches that create lasting impressions and foster loyalty.
ASR_explanation: This story primarily involves UI and email content customization without altering the overall system architecture or introducing new integration challenges.

user_story: In today's fast-paced world transparency and timely updates are not just a luxury but a necessity. When I shop online I not only expect a seamless shopping experience but also a comprehensive order tracking mechanism. This isn't just about knowing when I'll receive my order but it instills confidence in the e-commerce platform assuring me that they're invested in customer satisfaction every step of the way.
acceptance_criteria: Navigating through the e-commerce site or app should be intuitive. There should be a distinct "Order Tracking" option ideally placed prominently ensuring I don't have to hunt for it. Whether it's the main menu or the header it needs to be easy to locate. I don't want just sporadic updates; I want a comprehensive view of all my orders whether they're in the initial stages of processing on their way or have been delivered. It's essential for me to have a central hub where I can get an overview of all my purchases. Real-time is the keyword. From the moment I click on 'Purchase' I expect to see regular real-time updates on my order. Whether it's being prepared has left the warehouse or is out for delivery - I want to know. Repetition can be a good thing. To reinforce the previous point real-time updates at every stage of the delivery process are critical. Knowing the exact location and status of my order keeps me informed and gives me peace of mind. And finally once I've received my order I'd like a notification or an update confirming the successful delivery. This ensures that if I'm away or haven't checked I'm still in the loop. Details such as the exact date and time of delivery add to the precision and reliability of the e-commerce platform.
ASR_explanation: This requirement affects real-time data delivery and UI integration, directly impacting backend scalability and user experience design.

user_story: As a discerning customer my journey doesn't end with purchasing a product. Along the way I might encounter questions about the platform product or the services offered. An effective FAQ section isn't just about having a list of questions; it's about building a robust knowledge base that fosters trust instills confidence and most importantly ensures I can find answers without unnecessary delays.
acceptance_criteria: First impressions count. If I need to squint my eyes or search relentlessly to find the FAQ section then we're off to a rocky start. I expect the FAQ to be in a prominent spot whether on the homepage navigation menu or at least in the footer. Once I'm in the FAQ organization is key. Categorized and structured sections will make my journey smoother. Topics like 'orders' 'shipping' 'returns' and 'product information' should have their own distinct sections. This not only helps me navigate but also gives me a snapshot of the breadth of information available. Depth is as crucial as breadth. It's not just about the number of questions but the quality and comprehensiveness of answers. Whether I have queries about the intricacies of account management nuances of product details or specifics about returns I expect the FAQ to address them. Repetition can be avoided. While ensuring comprehensiveness is essential redundancy doesn't enhance the experience. It's important to ensure that questions aren't repetitive and each one adds unique value to the FAQ section.
ASR_explanation: This story mainly affects the user interface and content organization for the FAQ section rather than driving core system architecture changes.

user_story: As a passenger I want to track the location of my assigned vehicle in real-time on a map for transparency and convenience.
acceptance_criteria: The app provides a live map view displaying the real-time location of the assigned vehicle. Passengers can see the vehicle's movement including its route and estimated time of arrival. The map updates regularly to ensure accurate tracking.
ASR_explanation: Real-time vehicle tracking requires a robust, scalable system for streaming data, handling map integrations, and ensuring low latency updates that significantly impact the overall architecture.

user_story: As a passenger I want to know the estimated time of arrival (ETA for my ride to plan my journey effectively.
acceptance_criteria: The app displays the estimated arrival time of the assigned vehicle based on real-time location data. ETA is continuously updated to reflect any changes in traffic or route. Passengers receive notifications if there are significant delays in the ETA.
ASR_explanation: This user story requires integration with real-time location services and notification systems, impacting system scalability, performance, and responsiveness.

user_story:
As a tourist 
I want to have an in-application informing highlight that permits me to speak with individual explorers  partners in crime  specialist organizations  and local people while utilizing the movement stage
acceptance_criteria:
Given that I'm going with a gathering or family 
When I'm in a group setting 
Then at that point  the system ought to help bunch talks  empowering simple and productive correspondence among all gathering individuals.
ASR_explanation: This feature impacts the core communication system design, requiring real-time messaging, scalability, and group session management across potentially distributed users.

user_story:
As a tourist 
I want to use a Travel Budget Calculator in the tour management system 
So that I can plan and manage my expenses effectively during my trip.
acceptance_criteria:
Given that I want to make adjustments to my budget during the trip 
When I decide to redistribute funds between categories 
Then the system should allow me to easily make these adjustments and recalculate the budget.
ASR_explanation: This user story affects core business logic and UI flexibility for real-time budget recalculations, making it architecturally significant.

user_story:
As a tourist  
I want to access Accessibility Information within the tour management system  
So that I can plan my trips with confidence  knowing that my chosen destinations and accommodations are accessible and accommodating to my needs.
acceptance_criteria:
Given I am a an ecofriendly person  
When I look for Sustainable Tourism Options  
Then I should be able to find eco-friendly accommodations  activities  and transportation options  supporting my environmentally responsible travel choices.
ASR_explanation: This user story introduces filtering and data integration requirements for accessibility and eco-friendly information, affecting UI components, service design, and overall system modularity.

user_story:
As a tourist 
I want to use a Travel Budget Calculator in the tour management system 
So that I can plan and manage my expenses effectively during my trip.
acceptance_criteria:
Given that I want to make adjustments to my budget during the trip 
When I decide to redistribute funds between categories 
Then the system should allow me to easily make these adjustments and recalculate the budget.
ASR_explanation: This story focuses on a specific functionality without impacting core system components or requiring broad architectural changes.

user_story:
As a tourist  
I want to access a section in the app that provides me with up-to-date health and safety tips and guidelines for my travel destination  
So that I can stay informed and take necessary precautions during my journey.
acceptance_criteria:
Given I am preparing for an upcoming trip using the tour management system  
When I select the destination  
Then I should find comprehensive advice and recommendations on health and safety measures specific to my destination.
ASR_explanation: This user story mainly adds content to the UI and does not drive major changes in the application's architecture.

user_story:
As a tourist  
I want to easily find and view detailed information about nearby tourist attractions  
So that I can quickly decide which places to visit during my trip.
acceptance_criteria:
Given I am planning a trip using the tour management system  
When I go to other place 
Then I should be able to access information about nearby tourist attractions.
ASR_explanation: The feature requires integration with geolocation services and dynamic data retrieval, influencing system interfaces and scalability.

user_story:
As a tourist 
I want A real-time availability calendar for tours and accommodations.
So that I can plan my trip based on current availability.
acceptance_criteria:
Given I access the availability calendar
When I select my desired dates and search for tours or accommodations
Then I should see up-to-date information  including available dates  sold-out dates  and pending bookings. I can then proceed with the booking process without conflicts.
ASR_explanation: The requirement for real-time data synchronization affects database design, performance, and integration architecture to ensure timely and accurate availability information.

user_story:
As a tourist 
I want To easily find tours and destinations based on my preferences.
So that I can quickly discover options that match my interests.
acceptance_criteria:
Given I use the search and filter options
When I enter keywords or apply filters (activity type  location  price range)
Then I should see search results and filter options update dynamically without refreshing the entire page. Results should match my criteria accurately.
ASR_explanation: Dynamic filtering with asynchronous data retrieval affects both the frontend design and backend API architecture, which is architecturally significant.

user_story:
As a tourist 
I want Real-time currency conversion for making informed financial decisions
So that I can easily understand the value of prices in my home currency
acceptance_criteria:
Given I view prices for accommodations  activities  or transportation
When I select my preferred currency from a dropdown menu
Then I should see prices converted into the selected currency. The conversion rates should be accurate and updated regularly.
ASR_explanation: Real-time currency conversion impacts external integrations and data consistency, necessitating careful design to handle caching, API reliability, and performance.

user_story:
As a tourist 
I want Access to external services to enhance my travel experience.
So that I can enjoy additional features and options provided by third-party platforms.
acceptance_criteria:
Given I access integrated services
When I use features provided by external APIs (e.g.  restaurant reservations  local experiences)
Then I should be seamlessly redirected to the respective platform and be able to use the service without disruptions.
ASR_explanation: Integrating with external services impacts system integration design, security, and reliability, making it architecturally significant.

user_story: As a passenger  I want to be able to reserve a ticket quickly  so that I can save time when booking a bus ticket.
acceptance_criteria: The system should allow passengers to complete the entire ticket reservation process in under 2 minutes. Users should receive a confirmation message upon successful reservation with accurate details.
ASR_explanation: This user story impacts non-functional performance requirements and transactional workflows, influencing database design, caching strategies, and overall system responsiveness.

user_story: As a passenger  I want a clear and easy payment process  so that I can make secure online payments for my bus ticket.
acceptance_criteria: The payment process should provide clear instructions and options for users. Users should be able to complete the payment with real-time confirmation.
ASR_explanation: The payment process impacts key architectural concerns like security, external payment integration, and real-time transaction handling.

user_story: As a passenger  I want real-time bus updates  so I can plan my travel efficiently and stay informed about any delays.
acceptance_criteria: The system should provide real-time updates on the bus's location expected arrival time and any delays. Users should receive push notifications or email alerts for significant changes in the bus schedule.
ASR_explanation: This user story impacts system integration for real-time data streams and event-driven communication mechanisms.

user_story: As a passenger  I want reliable customer support  so I can receive assistance when needed.
acceptance_criteria: Customer support should provide a prompt response within 24 hours with clear and helpful assistance.
ASR_explanation: This story sets an operational SLA for customer support and doesn't require changes to system structure or core architectural components.

user_story: As a passenger  I want a transparent fare structure  so I can understand the cost of my trip.
acceptance_criteria: The system should display a detailed breakdown of the fare including base fare taxes and any additional charges. The final price should be clearly displayed before confirming the reservation.
ASR_explanation: This user story focuses primarily on UI presentation and business logic details, which do not fundamentally impact the overall system architecture.

user_story: As a passenger  I want an efficient refund process  so I can easily request and receive refunds when necessary.
acceptance_criteria: The refund process should be straightforward with a clear option to initiate a refund. Refunds should be processed within 5 business days and users should receive a notification when the refund is issued.
ASR_explanation: The refund process impacts critical system workflows, requiring reliable notifications, processing timelines, and integration with payment systems, thus affecting overall system architecture.

user_story: As a passenger  I want improved accessibility  so I can travel comfortably and safely.
acceptance_criteria: Buses should be equipped with features like ramps and designated spaces for passengers with disabilities. The system should allow passengers to request special assistance when booking tickets.
ASR_explanation: The story affects both physical design and booking system integrations, necessitating changes across multiple system layers.

user_story: As a passenger  I want more payment options  so I can choose a convenient payment method.
acceptance_criteria: The payment system should accept a variety of payment methods including credit cards mobile wallets and online banking. Passengers should receive a payment confirmation upon successful transaction.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts the payment subsystem's integration design by requiring support for multiple external payment services.

user_story: As a passenger  I want an easy booking cancellation process  so I can quickly make changes to my travel plans.
acceptance_criteria: The system should allow users to cancel bookings with a simple and clear cancellation option. Users should receive a confirmation of the cancellation and the refund process should be initiated automatically.
ASR_explanation: This user story is architecturally significant because it affects the design of core booking workflows, refund automation, and integration with external payment systems.

user_story: As a passenger  I want a streamlined check-in process  so I can board the bus quickly and easily.
acceptance_criteria: Users should complete check-in and boarding through the mobile app. The system should prompt users to check in and provide their QR code or mobile ticket at the designated pickup point. Passengers should experience a hassle-free check-in process.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts system integration and security aspects by requiring mobile app coordination, QR authentication, and reliable UX for the check-in process.

user_story: As a passenger  I want to receive real-time service alerts  so I can adjust my plans in case of disruptions.
acceptance_criteria: Users should have the option to subscribe to real-time service alerts via the mobile app or website. They should receive notifications about delays cancellations or other service changes. The alerts should provide alternative travel options.
ASR_explanation: It requires integrating a real-time notification system with subscription management across multiple platforms, which impacts backend design and cross-system communication.

user_story: As a passenger  I want to enroll in an easy-to-use loyalty program  so I can earn rewards and discounts.
acceptance_criteria: Users should be able to sign up for a loyalty program within the mobile app or website. The program should offer clear benefits such as discounts on future bookings exclusive offers and loyalty points. Passengers should earn points for every completed trip.
ASR_explanation: The loyalty program integration affects data storage, service dependencies, and system consistency, making it architecturally significant.

user_story: As a passenger  I want buses to offer high-speed enhanced Wi-Fi services on board  so I can stay connected during my trip.
acceptance_criteria: Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the journey. Users should connect to the Wi-Fi network using a secure and straightforward process. The Wi-Fi service should support streaming and browsing.
ASR_explanation: This feature impacts the vehicle's networking architecture by requiring secure and high-bandwidth on-board connectivity that integrates with existing IT and hardware systems.

user_story: As a passenger  I want a fast and efficient boarding process  so I can board the bus without delays.
acceptance_criteria: Passengers should receive a digital boarding pass upon ticket purchase. Boarding should involve scanning the QR code on the mobile ticket or pass. Passengers should experience a seamless and quick boarding process.
ASR_explanation: It impacts system integration and performance by requiring secure digital boarding passes and QR scanning capabilities to ensure a fast boarding process.

user_story: As a passenger  I want an improved seat selection process  so I can choose my preferred seat.
acceptance_criteria: Users should be able to view the bus layout and select their preferred seat when booking tickets. The system should offer clear visuals of available seats including those with extra legroom. Passengers should receive a seat confirmation.
ASR_explanation: This story mainly involves UI enhancements that do not necessitate major changes to the overall system architecture.

user_story: As a passenger  I want multiple trip options  so I can choose the most convenient schedule.
acceptance_criteria: Users should be presented with a range of departure times and routes for their selected journey. The system should provide information on available classes amenities and prices. Passengers should have the flexibility to choose the most suitable option.
ASR_explanation: This user story focuses on business functionality and user experience without imposing additional structural or performance-related constraints on the architecture.

user_story: As a passenger  I want responsive customer support  so I can receive assistance and solutions quickly.
acceptance_criteria: Users should have access to a 24/7 customer support hotline and chat support through the mobile app or website. Customer support agents should respond promptly and provide solutions to inquiries or issues. Passengers should receive an acknowledgment of their support request.
ASR_explanation: This feature influences system availability and third‐party integration, requiring robust, scalable designs for multi-channel, real-time support.

user_story: As a passenger  I want a user-friendly mobile app  so I can easily navigate and book my trips.
acceptance_criteria: The mobile app should offer an intuitive and visually appealing interface. Users should find it easy to search for routes view schedules and book tickets. The app should also allow users to manage their bookings and track their loyalty program points.
ASR_explanation: This user story is architecturally significant as it influences the design of the mobile application's interface, integration with backend systems, and overall user experience which are pivotal to the system’s architecture.

user_story: As a passenger  I want in-app entertainment options  so I can enjoy my travel time.
acceptance_criteria: The mobile app should provide a selection of in-app entertainment including movies music and ebooks. Users should be able to access entertainment content via the app during their journey. The system should offer content suitable for all age groups.
ASR_explanation: This story primarily defines a feature enhancement with limited impact on underlying architectural decisions.

user_story: As a passenger  I want a streamlined check-in process  so I can board the bus quickly and easily.
acceptance_criteria: Users should complete check-in and boarding through the mobile app. The system should prompt users to check in and provide their QR code or mobile ticket at the designated pickup point. Passengers should experience a hassle-free check-in process.
ASR_explanation: This feature impacts mobile-backend integration, performance, and reliability due to its reliance on dynamic QR code generation and a seamless user interface.

user_story: As a passenger  I want to enjoy complimentary premium Wi-Fi during my journey  so I can stay connected with high-speed internet.
acceptance_criteria: The system should provide complimentary premium Wi-Fi with high-speed connectivity on all buses. Passengers should be able to connect to the network without additional charges or login requirements. The Wi-Fi service should support streaming  video calls  and high data usage.
ASR_explanation: This feature requires integrating high-bandwidth network infrastructure into buses, impacting system scalability and reliability.

user_story: As a passenger  I want access to exclusive lounges at select pickup points  so I can enjoy a premium experience before my journey.
acceptance_criteria: The system should offer access to exclusive lounges at major pickup points for premium and loyalty program members. Passengers should be able to relax  access refreshments  and enjoy premium amenities before boarding. Access should be granted upon showing a digital pass or ticket.
ASR_explanation: This story introduces integration requirements between digital ticketing/authentication and physical access control systems, impacting key architectural components such as security and external system interfaces.

user_story: As a passenger  I want a personalised on-board concierge to assist with my travel needs  so I can experience a high level of service.
acceptance_criteria: Passengers should have access to a dedicated on-board concierge via the mobile app. The concierge should assist with various travel needs  such as meal preferences  destination recommendations  and special arrangements. Users should receive personalised service throughout the journey.
ASR_explanation: The inclusion of a personalized on-board concierge requires integration of real-time, personalized services and modular interactive components in the mobile app, impacting system scalability and design.

user_story: As a passenger  I want to subscribe to an in-seat entertainment service  so I can enjoy a wide range of entertainment options during my journey.
acceptance_criteria: Passengers should be able to subscribe to an in-seat entertainment service through the mobile app or website. The subscription should provide access to a library of movies  TV shows  music  and ebooks. Users should be able to use their personal devices to access the content.
ASR_explanation: This story necessitates changes in the mobile app and web architecture to integrate subscription management and content delivery across multiple devices.

user_story: As a passenger  I want personalised trip packages that include additional services and experiences  so I can have a unique travel experience.
acceptance_criteria: Passengers should receive personalised trip package recommendations based on their travel interests  such as adventure  relaxation  or family trips. Packages may include additional services like guided tours  meal vouchers  and special activities. Users should be able to book these packages through the mobile app.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts the system architecture by requiring integration of a personalized recommendation engine, additional services management, and extended mobile app functionality.

user_story: As an admin  I want a real-time performance analytics dashboard for data-driven decisions  so I can optimise operations effectively.
acceptance_criteria: The system should offer a dashboard with real-time data on key performance metrics. It should allow customizable widgets and data visualization  supporting exportable reports for decision-making.
ASR_explanation: This user story affects architectural design as it requires implementing real-time data processing, customizable dashboard components, and robust reporting capabilities.

user_story: As a manager  I want an automated fleet management system to optimize scheduling  maintenance  and allocation  so I can streamline operations.
acceptance_criteria: The system should automate bus route scheduling  maintenance checks  and staff allocation. It should employ data analytics for route optimization based on demand  traffic conditions  and fuel efficiency.
ASR_explanation: This story requires integrating analytics, scheduling, and maintenance modules, which significantly impacts data flows, scalability, and system integration strategies.

user_story: As an admin  I want an advanced CRM system for effective customer relationship management  personalized marketing  and improved loyalty programs.
acceptance_criteria: The CRM system should offer detailed customer profiles  track interactions  and segment passengers based on preferences and travel history. It should facilitate personalized marketing campaigns and loyalty program management.
ASR_explanation: This story is architecturally significant because adding an advanced CRM impacts system integrations, data models, and module boundaries for handling customer profiles and marketing functionalities.

user_story: As a manager  I want a streamlined financial reporting system to simplify financial analysis  budgeting  and forecasting.
acceptance_criteria: The system should generate comprehensive financial reports  including income statements  balance sheets  and cash flow statements. It should support budgeting and forecasting tools  facilitating financial analysis.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts core data integration, processing, and reporting modules, making it architecturally significant.

user_story: As a passenger  I want a quick and efficient online payment process for ticket reservation  ensuring a seamless transaction experience.
acceptance_criteria: The system should provide a secure and user-friendly payment gateway allowing passengers to complete transactions in under 2 minutes. Confirmation messages should include accurate reservation details.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts the security, performance, and integration architecture due to its requirements for fast and secure transactions.

user_story: As a passenger  I want to view and manage my past trip history  facilitating easy access to previous reservations and trips.
acceptance_criteria: Passengers should have access to a comprehensive history of previous trips and reservations via their profile. The system should allow users to review and manage these records effortlessly.
ASR_explanation: This requirement focuses on standard user profile functionality and does not impose a significant impact on the overall system architecture.

user_story: As a passenger  I want to receive timely notifications regarding any changes or updates to my booked journey  ensuring I'm informed about alterations.
acceptance_criteria: The system should send immediate notifications to passengers regarding any changes in departure time  seat allocation  or bus cancellations. Users should be promptly informed through SMS or app notifications.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts the system architecture by requiring integration with external notification services and robust handling of real-time messaging.

user_story: As a passenger  I want to have access to 24/7 customer support for immediate assistance in case of issues or queries.
acceptance_criteria: The system should provide round-the-clock customer support accessible via the app or phone. Passengers should receive immediate assistance for any booking-related queries or issues.
ASR_explanation: This user story impacts architecture by necessitating high availability, integration with external support channels, and scalable communication interfaces.

user_story: As an admin  I want a feature to track and manage bus maintenance schedules  ensuring timely servicing and safety compliance.
acceptance_criteria: The system should enable admins to monitor and schedule regular bus maintenance checks. It should provide alerts for upcoming services and maintenance requirements to ensure compliance and passenger safety.
ASR_explanation: The feature requires a scheduling module with event-driven notification capabilities that impacts system design for safety and compliance.

user_story: As an admin  I want the ability to set promotional offers or discounts for specific events or seasons to attract more passengers.
acceptance_criteria: The system should allow admins to create and manage promotional offers or discounts for special events like holidays or festivals. Offers should be easily applied during ticket reservation.
ASR_explanation: The requirement impacts the pricing and ticket reservation modules by introducing new business logic for discounts and potentially altering integration points.

user_story: As an admin  I want a robust reporting tool to generate insights on passenger preferences  travel patterns  and revenue analysis.
acceptance_criteria: The system should provide comprehensive reports with detailed insights on passenger preferences  travel trends  and revenue analysis. Admins should be able to generate these reports for informed decision-making.
ASR_explanation: This requirement is architecturally significant as it impacts data analytics, storage, and performance across multiple system components.

user_story: As a manager  I want an overview dashboard displaying real-time bus occupancy rates and seat availability to aid in operational decisions.
acceptance_criteria: The system should present an intuitive dashboard for managers to monitor real-time bus occupancy rates and available seats. This feature should support data-driven operational decisions.
ASR_explanation: This story affects the system's real-time data processing and UI presentation layers, requiring integration with live data streams and high availability.

user_story: As a manager  I want the system to predict demand for different routes based on historical data and trends for effective resource allocation.
acceptance_criteria: The system should employ data analytics to forecast passenger demand for various routes. It should use historical data and trends to predict demand  aiding in resource allocation and scheduling.
ASR_explanation: This story requires integration of data analytics and forecasting capabilities, significantly impacting data storage, processing pipelines, and potentially machine learning infrastructure.

user_story: As an admin  I want a user-friendly interface for easy configuration and management of bus routes  pickups  and drop-off points.
acceptance_criteria: The system interface should allow admins to easily add  modify  or remove bus routes  pickup locations  and drop-off points. It should facilitate effortless configuration and management of these elements.
ASR_explanation: This feature drives the design of the admin configuration module, impacting UI, data integrity, and system scalability.

user_story: As an admin  I want a centralized database for efficient storage and management of passenger and trip-related information.
acceptance_criteria: The system should maintain a centralized and secure database for storing and managing passenger profiles  trip history  reservations  and other relevant information.
ASR_explanation: This will impact the system’s core data architecture, affecting scalability, security, and performance across multiple services.

user_story: As a passenger  I want an intuitive mobile app interface for easy navigation and hassle-free ticket reservations.
acceptance_criteria: The mobile app interface should be user-friendly  offering intuitive navigation for seamless ticket reservations. It should provide a hassle-free experience for passengers during the booking process.
ASR_explanation: This story mainly focuses on usability and UI aspects, which have limited impact on the overall system architecture.

user_story: As a user  I want the app to provide personalized event recommendations based on my interests and major  so I can easily discover relevant campus events.
acceptance_criteria:
The app should have a user profile setup process where users can specify their interests and majors.
 When a user's profile is set up  the app should use this information to recommend events. 
 Recommended events should align with the user's interests and major. 
 Users should be able to view these recommendations on their home screen
ASR_explanation: This story introduces personalized recommendation logic and profile management, affecting data models, user interface modules, and potentially new service components.

user_story: As a user  I want features that enable me to connect with like-minded students and faculty members  so I can engage in meaningful social interactions within the app.
acceptance_criteria:
Users should be able to search for other users based on criteria like name  major  or interests. 
 Users should have the ability to send connection requests to other users. 
  Once connected  users should be able to chat  join discussion groups  or create their own discussion groups
ASR_explanation: This user story has architectural significance as it necessitates scalable social networking features including search, real-time communications, and group management, impacting both backend services and data models.

user_story: As a user  I want the app to include an event calendar with event reminders and the ability to sync with external calendar apps  so I can effectively manage my schedule
acceptance_criteria:
Users should be able to add events to the app's calendar. 
 Users should have the option to set event reminders. 
 The app should support synchronization with external calendar applications like Google Calendar and Apple Calendar
ASR_explanation: The integration of external calendars and event scheduling introduces cross-cutting concerns like synchronization, data integrity, and real-time notifications, impacting core architecture components.

user_story: As a user  I want the ability to provide feedback and ratings for events I attend  so I can share my thoughts and experiences with other users and event organizers.
acceptance_criteria:
When providing feedback  users should be able to write comments or reviews about the event. 
 Users should be able to rate the event on a scale  such as 1 to 5 stars. 
 The feedback and ratings should be submitted and visible to other users who view the event details. 
 Event organizers should have access to the feedback and ratings for their event.
ASR_explanation: This story introduces a new functionality for feedback and ratings that can be addressed with typical data model and UI enhancements without significant changes to the overall system architecture.

user_story: As a campus staff member  I want the app to facilitate the event submission and approval process  allowing me to efficiently manage event submissions and ensure they align with campus guidelines and standards.
acceptance_criteria:
Campus staff should have the ability to review event submissions  request additional information  and approve or reject events. 
 If an event is approved  it should be added to the campus event calendar. 
 If an event is rejected  the event organizer should receive a notification with an explanation.                                                                                                                      The app should allow event organizers to track the status of their event submissions. 
 Event organizers should have the option to edit and resubmit events that have been rejected.
ASR_explanation: This story introduces key approval workflows and integration points (notifications, calendar updates, and role-based UI) that will significantly influence the system's architecture.

user_story: As a user  I want the app to provide me with timely and relevant campus news and updates  so I can stay informed about important information  departmental news  and relevant events.
acceptance_criteria:
The app should have a dedicated "Campus News" section on the main dashboard. 
 Users should be able to view the latest campus news and updates. 
 Users should be able to filter news by categories  including general campus news  department-specific news  policy changes  and event promotions. 
 The app should allow users to customize their notification preferences for news categories  so they receive relevant updates. 
 Users should be able to click on news articles to view detailed information
ASR_explanation: This story affects key architectural components such as dynamic content delivery, modular UI design, and notification systems that require careful integration and scalability planning.

user_story: As a faculty member  I want the app to allow me to send course announcements to my students  so I can effectively communicate important information related to my courses.
acceptance_criteria:
Faculty members should be able to access a course management section. 
 In this section  faculty members can create announcements with text and 
attachments.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Announcements should be delivered to all students registered in the course. 
 Students should receive notifications for new announcements. 
 Faculty members should have the ability to edit or delete announcements.
ASR_explanation: The story impacts core modules (course management, notifications, and content handling) and requires integration considerations across the application's layers.

user_story: As a faculty member  I want the app to provide features that allow me to create collaborative research projects and invite other faculty members to participate  so I can  efficiently coordinate research efforts.
acceptance_criteria:
Faculty members should have the option to create a new research project
Then  they should be able to set the project's title  description  and goals.   Faculty members should be able to invite other faculty members to join the project. 
 The app should provide a discussion board within each project for collaboration and  communication. 
 Faculty members should be able to upload and share research findings and documents within the project.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts the core architecture by introducing collaborative research, communication, and file-sharing features that require integration of user management, data security, and real-time communication components.

user_story:
As a user  I want to be able to authenticate and log in to the app using my 
credentials  ensuring my account security and access to personalized features
acceptance_criteria:
Users should be presented with a login screen upon launching the app. 
 Users should be able to enter their username (or email) and password to log in. 
The app should provide password recovery options (e.g.  "Forgot Password") to assist users in case they forget their login details. 
 Users should receive feedback and error messages if login credentials are incorrect. 
 Successful login should grant access to the app's main interface. 
 Users should have the option to log out from their accounts.
ASR_explanation: This user story affects core security, session management, and authentication service layers, making it architecturally significant.

user_story: As a student  I want to view campus job listings in the app  so I can explore employment opportunities on campus.
acceptance_criteria:
The app should provide a section for job listings. 
 Job listings should include details such as job title  department  application deadline  and a brief description. 
 Users should be able to filter job listings based on criteria like job type  department  and application deadline.
ASR_explanation: This feature is a standard UI enhancement with filtering functionality, not requiring significant changes to the overall system architecture.

user_story: As a student  I want the app to display real-time information about the course availability and seat status  so I can make informed course selections.
acceptance_criteria:
The app should regularly update course availability data. 
 Users should see the number of available seats for each course.

user_story: As a student  I want the app to offer a mentorship program  allowing me to find and connect with experienced mentors who can guide me in my academic and career goals.
acceptance_criteria:
The app should feature a dedicated mentorship section. 
 Users can search for mentors based on areas of expertise  majors  or career interests.

 The app should facilitate mentor-mentee communication and scheduling.
ASR_explanation: This user story introduces a new module with complex features such as searching, communication, and scheduling, which will require significant architectural integration and design.

user_story: As a student  I want to be able to reserve academic resources such as study rooms  library materials  and lab equipment through the app  so I can optimize my study and research efforts.
acceptance_criteria:
The app should provide a section for resource reservations. 
Users can check the availability of study rooms  library books  and lab equipment. 
 Users should be able to reserve resources  specify the date and time  and receive confirmation. 
The app should send reminders for resource reservations
ASR_explanation: This adds complexity by introducing scheduling, availability validation, and notification components that impact both the backend services and UI design.

user_story:
As a faculty member  I want the app to enable me to invite guest lecturers to my classes

user_story:
As a user  I want the app to provide language learning clubs and conversation partners

user_story: As a student  I want the app to display enhanced course syllabi  including detailed information on readings  assignments  and grading criteria  so I can better prepare for my courses.
acceptance_criteria:
Course syllabi in the app should include a breakdown of topics  readings  and assignments.

  Rewards and recognition should be provided for active participants.

user_story: As a health-conscious user  I want the app to host wellness challenges  encouraging me to engage in physical activities  maintain a healthy lifestyle  and connect with like-minded individuals.

  Users can join wellness challenges focused on activities like walking  yoga  or healthy eating.
  Users should be able to log their activities and monitor their progress.

Users can download or bookmark publications for future reference.

Automated notifications are sent to external authorities for severe incidents.                                                                                                                                            Access to a log of previously reported incidents is available for analysis.

acceptance_criteria: The app has a "Maintenance Requests" section.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Users can submit maintenance requests with location and description.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   Facilities managers receive real-time notifications for new requests and prioritize requests.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Requests have status updates: in progress  completed  or requiring further action.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Users receive automated updates on their request's status.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Users can provide feedback on the quality and timeliness of maintenance work.

user_story: As a passenger  I want the option to book multiple seats for a single ride to accommodate my travel companions.
acceptance_criteria: Passengers can select the number of seats they wish to book during the ride booking process. The app confirms the availability of the requested number of seats before finalizing the booking. Each booked seat is associated with the passenger's profile information.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts the core booking process and data model by requiring simultaneous multi-seat reservations with individual passenger links and availability checks.

user_story: As a passenger  I want to view the selected route for my ride to have a clear understanding of the journey.
acceptance_criteria: The app provides a visual representation of the selected route on a map. Passengers can see the pickup location  drop-off location  and any intermediate stops. The route is adjustable  allowing passengers to suggest changes based on preferences.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts the system's integration with mapping services and interactive UI design, requiring careful architectural planning for scalability and user customization.

user_story: As a passenger  I want to receive a notification when my ride arrives at the pickup location to ensure I don't miss it.
acceptance_criteria:
Passengers receive a real-time notification when the assigned vehicle arrives at the pickup location.
The notification includes details about the vehicle (e.g.  make  model  and license plate number).
Notifications are sent with enough lead time to allow passengers to prepare for boarding.
ASR_explanation: It affects messaging infrastructure and real-time event processing, which are key architectural concerns for latency and reliability.

user_story: As a user  I want the flexibility to choose from various payment methods to complete my ride.
acceptance_criteria:
The app supports multiple payment options  including credit/debit cards  digital wallets  and cash.
Users can securely store and manage their payment information within the app.
Payment methods are clearly presented during the booking process.
ASR_explanation: This user story impacts the payment processing modules and security architecture, requiring integration with multiple external payment gateways and secure data handling.

user_story: As a passenger  I want to know the estimated fare for my ride based on the distance traveled.
acceptance_criteria:
The app provides a fare calculator that estimates the cost of the ride based on distance.
Fare estimates are provided before confirming the booking.
The calculated fare is transparent and includes any additional charges or fees.
ASR_explanation: This user story primarily involves business logic for calculating fares and does not significantly impact system-wide architectural decisions.

user_story: As a user  I want the ability to create and manage my profile within the app for a personalized experience.
acceptance_criteria:
Users can sign up and create profiles with their personal information  including name  contact details  and payment preferences.
Users can update their profiles at any time to reflect changes in information.
The app verifies and secures user profiles to ensure data integrity.
ASR_explanation: The user profile functionality involves secure data storage, authentication, and user data management, which are central to the system's overall security and data integrity architecture.

user_story: As a user  I want access to a history of my past rides for reference and record-keeping purposes.
acceptance_criteria:
The app provides a detailed ride history section where users can view past rides  including dates  routes  and fares.
Users can filter and search for specific rides based on criteria such as date  location  or driver.
Ride history is accessible and organized for easy retrieval.
ASR_explanation: This user story deals primarily with data display and filtering, which does not significantly impact the overall system architecture.

user_story: As a user  I want the option to engage in a real-time chat with customer support for assistance and inquiries.
acceptance_criteria:
The app features a customer support chat function accessible from the user interface.
Users can initiate a chat session with a customer support representative.
Response times are prompt  and the chat system allows for clear communication.
ASR_explanation: Enabling real-time support chat requires new asynchronous communication and session management mechanisms that impact scalability and system integration.

user_story: As a user  I want the ability to rate and provide feedback on my ride experience to contribute to driver and service quality.
acceptance_criteria:
After each completed ride  users have the option to rate the driver and provide written feedback.
Ratings are submitted through a user-friendly interface with clear instructions.
Feedback is recorded and used to maintain service standards and improve user experience.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts multiple layers (data storage, integration, and UI), requiring careful architectural considerations for scalability, performance, and data integrity.

user_story: As a driver  I want to create and manage my profile on the app to provide passengers with relevant information about myself and my vehicle.
acceptance_criteria:
Drivers can sign up with their personal details  including name  photo  contact information  and vehicle details.
Drivers can edit and update their profiles at any time through the app.
The app verifies and approves profiles to ensure accurate and reliable information.
ASR_explanation: This story represents standard CRUD functionality with localized impact on the user profile module, not significantly affecting the overall system architecture.

user_story: As a driver  I want the ability to accept or reject booking requests based on my availability and preferences.
acceptance_criteria:
Drivers receive notification alerts for incoming booking requests.
Drivers can view details of the ride  including pickup and drop-off points  estimated duration  and passenger information.
Drivers have the option to accept or reject a booking within a specified time frame.
ASR_explanation: This story impacts the design of real-time communication and notification mechanisms, requiring architectural patterns to ensure scalability, responsiveness, and timeout management.

acceptance_criteria:
The app provides real-time GPS navigation with clear and accurate directions.
Drivers can input addresses manually or use previous ride history for quick selection.

acceptance_criteria:
The app displays the names and number of passengers for each booked ride.

The app updates in real-time to reflect the driver's current status.
When set to "Unavailable " drivers will not receive ride requests.

acceptance_criteria:

ASR_explanation: This requirement is architecturally significant because it introduces security controls (e.g., authentication/authorization and encryption) that affect core components and data flows.

user_story: As an admin I want strong authentication and secure session management so that unauthorized access is prevented.
acceptance_criteria: Given a user account and an active session. When a login occurs or a session token is issued. Then passwords are hashed (salted), sessions expire after 30 minutes of inactivity, and optional MFA can be enforced by policy.
ASR_explanation: This requirement is architecturally significant because it introduces security controls (e.g., authentication/authorization and encryption) that affect core components and data flows.

user_story: As a student I want the service to recover quickly after outages so that business operations can continue.
acceptance_criteria: Given an outage or node failure. When the incident occurs. Then the system can restore service within 5 minutes (RTO) and data loss is limited to 5 minutes (RPO) using backups and replication.
ASR_explanation: This requirement is architecturally significant because it sets performance/scalability constraints that may require caching, load balancing, and careful resource management.

user_story: As a system administrator I want observability (logs, metrics, traces) so that we can diagnose issues quickly.
acceptance_criteria: Given production traffic. When an error or slow request happens. Then logs include correlation IDs, metrics are captured for key endpoints, and traces are available for the top 5 slowest requests.
ASR_explanation: This requirement is architecturally significant because it sets a quality attribute constraint that affects core system design and deployment.

user_story: As a developer I want key screens to load within 3 seconds for 100 concurrent users so that I can work without delays.
acceptance_criteria: Given 100 concurrent active sessions. When users perform login, search, and primary workflows. Then 95% of page loads complete within 3 seconds and CPU/memory remain within configured limits.
ASR_explanation: This requirement is architecturally significant because it sets performance/scalability constraints that may require caching, load balancing, and careful resource management.
